nodes.label: Next.js Breaking Changes Warning
nodes.rationale: This project uses a non-standard Next.js version with breaking API and convention changes from training data.

nodes.label: Row Level Security beatmaker_id = auth.uid()
nodes.rationale: Universal RLS pattern — all tables filter by beatmaker_id matching the authenticated user's UID.

nodes.label: Cloudflare R2 File Storage
nodes.rationale: All audio/file assets stored in Cloudflare R2. URLs stored in beats table columns (mp3_tague_url, mp3_propre_url, wav_url, stems_url).

nodes.label: LTV Calculated Dynamically
nodes.rationale: LTV (Lifetime Value) is not stored in beatmakers — computed dynamically from abonnements_plateforme.

nodes.label: Étape 11d — Outil Business (bonus)
nodes.rationale: Migration crm-proto → /dashboard/business. Absorbs étapes 12 (emails) and 13 (analytics back-office). Four phases: Foundation, CRM, Commerce, Analytics.

nodes.label: Outil Business /dashboard/business
nodes.rationale: Back-office complet : CRM (contacts/doublons/listes/segments), Commerce (commandes/abonnements/plans/beats/licences/collabs/codes-promo), Marketing (gelé), Analytics (7 onglets SQL). Sidebar dédiée, layout propre.

nodes.label: crm-proto UI Reference
nodes.rationale: Static UI prototype at C:/Users/nicoj/crm-proto — definitive back-office design, to be migrated to beatplatform.
